title: ZiMusic
description: A powerful music player forked from ViMusic. Features word-level synced lyrics, a custom audio enhancing pipeline, and Spotify integration.

title: NeoGram
description: An enhanced Telegram fork focusing on a refined user interface and powerful new features for power users.

title: Project Stratum
description: An innovative custom Android ROM featuring deep AOSP framework modifications, including Nothing OS-style Quick Settings, Glassmorphism UI elements, and a redesigned Settings dashboard.

title: CNN Classification
description: An initial implementation of a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) that classifies images of Cats and Dogs.
